description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the maven:3-eclipse-temurin-21 Docker image, caching the Maven repository at .m2/repository keyed by pom.xml, and defining build and deploy stages. In the build stage add a build job that runs apt-get update -y, installs ghostscript, imagemagick and webp, clones the avalanche-warning-maps repository, exports GIT_VERSION=$(git describe --tags), updates the project version with mvn versions:set -DgenerateBackupPoms=false -DnewVersion=$GIT_VERSION, runs mvn install, renames the produced jar to target/albina.jar, and always publishes target/albina.jar, target/test-results/ and JUnit XML reports as artifacts; the job triggers on merge‑request events, tags, or the default branch. Define a hidden .deploy template whose before_script starts ssh-agent, adds $SSH_PRIVATE_KEY, creates ~/.ssh with proper permissions, copies $SSH_KNOWN_HOSTS to known_hosts, and whose script updates apt, installs rsync, exports GIT_VERSION, sets the Maven version, runs mvn install -Dmaven.test.skip=true, rsyncs target/albina-$GIT_VERSION.jar to $SSH_SERVER:$JAR_PATH over port 2201, and restarts $SYSTEMD_SERVICE via ssh. Add a deploy to development job extending .deploy, running in the deploy stage, targeting the development environment, setting JAR_PATH and SYSTEMD_SERVICE for the dev server, and executing only on the default branch with a manual, allowed‑failure trigger. Add a deploy to production job extending .deploy, running in the deploy stage, targeting the production environment, with its own JAR_PATH and SYSTEMD_SERVICE, and executing only on tag pushes as a manual, allowed‑failure step.
